title: Ropedia Xperience-10M Rendered Website Check
flow: load current docs server -> open #walkthroughs deep link -> click Next -> click Process story chapter

observations.exercised_flow: load current docs server -> open #walkthroughs deep link -> click Next -> click Process story chapter
observations.title: Ropedia Xperience-10M Task Suite

checks.name: page_identity
checks.reason: The rendered page should load the expected local site title and URL.
checks.title: Ropedia Xperience-10M Task Suite

checks.name: first_meaningful_content
checks.reason: The first meaningful heading should identify the research task lab.

checks.name: responsive_viewport_recorded
checks.reason: The browser run should record a narrow responsive viewport large enough to expose the mobile/tablet layout.

checks.name: tabbed_research_navigation
checks.reason: The rendered top-level tab system should switch to the Data tab for the walkthrough deep link.

checks.name: task_and_modality_cards_render
checks.reason: The rendered task and modality sections should expose all 12 task cards and seven modality cards.

checks.name: walkthrough_deep_link
checks.reason: The walkthrough deep link should reveal the walkthrough player, all task selectors, and four chapter controls.

checks.name: walkthrough_interaction
checks.reason: Clicking Next and the Process chapter should update the active task, chapter, counter, and frame label.

checks.name: rendered_check_resource_link
checks.reason: The rendered page should expose the rendered website check JSON from the resource section.

checks.name: console_health
checks.reason: The rendered flow should complete without browser console warnings or errors.
